title: Burgers conservative update unfolds to a flux-difference update

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: The Burgers conservative update equals the old state minus scale times the local Burgers flux difference.
assumptions: scale is a real update scale
u is a real-valued grid state on natural-number indices
i is a natural-number grid index
informal.expected_conclusion: The Burgers update unfolds to the expected conservative flux-difference form.

declarations.name: burgersConservativeUpdate
declarations.statement: def burgersConservativeUpdate (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : Real := conservativeUpdate scale u (burgersFlux u) i

declarations.name: burgersConservativeUpdate_eq
declarations.statement: theorem burgersConservativeUpdate_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i = u i - scale * (burgersFlux u (i + 1) - burgersFlux u i)

tasks.input: Translate this Burgers conservative finite-difference theorem into Lean 4: The Burgers conservative update equals the old state minus scale times the local Burgers flux difference.
tasks.target: theorem burgersConservativeUpdate_eq (scale : Real) (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : burgersConservativeUpdate scale u i = u i - scale * (burgersFlux u (i + 1) - burgersFlux u i)

tasks.input: Given the Burgers scaffold definitions and referenced conservation lemmas, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding burgersConservativeUpdate, conservativeUpdate, and fluxDifference.
